testcase.name: TC_Dashboard_231
testcase.system-out: TC_Dashboard_231 - Verify that user can add new record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_231 - PASSED: Add record verified

testcase.name: TC_Dashboard_232
testcase.system-out: TC_Dashboard_232 - Verify that user can edit existing record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_232 - PASSED: Edit record verified

testcase.name: TC_Dashboard_233
testcase.system-out: TC_Dashboard_233 - Verify that user can delete record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_233 - PASSED: Delete record verified

testcase.name: TC_Dashboard_234
testcase.system-out: TC_Dashboard_234 - Verify that user can search records in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_234 - PASSED: Search record verified

testsuite.system-out: TC_Dashboard_231 - Verify that user can add new record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_231 - PASSED: Add record verified TC_Dashboard_232 - Verify that user can edit existing record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_232 - PASSED: Edit record verified TC_Dashboard_233 - Verify that user can delete record in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_233 - PASSED: Delete record verified TC_Dashboard_234 - Verify that user can search records in Dashboard module. TC_Dashboard_234 - PASSED: Search record verified
